# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data - with encryption and backup policies included from the start

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
    Description: EC2 instance type

  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC to deploy instances into

  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet to deploy instances into

  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2023 AMI

  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development

  BackupRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 7
    MaxValue: 365
    Description: Number of days to retain backups

Resources:

  # KMS Key for EBS encryption - security should never be deferred
  EBSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for EBS volume encryption
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowKeyUsageForEBS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt EC2Role.Arn
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext
              - kms:ReEncryptFrom
              - kms:ReEncryptTo
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-ebs-key

  EBSEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub alias/${AWS::StackName}-ebs-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EBSEncryptionKey

  # IAM Role for EC2 with least privilege
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  # Security Group with restrictive rules
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/8
          Description: Allow HTTPS from internal network only
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow outbound HTTPS
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-sg

  # EC2 Instance with encrypted root volume and IMDSv2 enforced
  AppInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      # Enforce IMDSv2 to prevent SSRF-based credential theft
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
      # Enable detailed monitoring
      Monitoring: true
      # Encrypted root volume
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
            KmsKeyId: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-app-instance
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'

  # Application Data EBS Volume - encrypted from day one
  AppDataVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    DeletionPolicy: Snapshot
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Snapshot
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt AppInstance.AvailabilityZone
      Size: 100
      VolumeType: gp3
      Iops: 3000
      Throughput: 125
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-app-data
        - Key: Backup
          Value: 'true'

  AppDataVolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/xvdf
      InstanceId: !Ref AppInstance
      VolumeId: !Ref AppDataVolume

  # AWS Backup - backup policies included now, not deferred
  BackupVault:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupVault
    Properties:
      BackupVaultName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-vault
      EncryptionKeyArn: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn
      AccessPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyDeleteRecoveryPoints
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - backup:DeleteRecoveryPoint
              - backup:UpdateRecoveryPointLifecycle
            Resource: '*'

  BackupPlan:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupPlan
    Properties:
      BackupPlan:
        BackupPlanName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-backup-plan
        BackupPlanRule:
          - RuleName: DailyBackup
            TargetBackupVault: !Ref BackupVault
            ScheduleExpression: cron(0 3 * * ? *)
            StartWindowMinutes: 60
            CompletionWindowMinutes: 180
            Lifecycle:
              DeleteAfterDays: !Ref BackupRetentionDays
            EnableContinuousBackup: false
          - RuleName: WeeklyBackup
            TargetBackupVault: !Ref BackupVault
            ScheduleExpression: cron(0 5 ? * SUN *)
            StartWindowMinutes: 60
            CompletionWindowMinutes: 360
            Lifecycle:
              DeleteAfterDays: 90

  BackupRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForBackup
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForRestores

  BackupSelection:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupSelection
    Properties:
      BackupPlanId: !Ref BackupPlan
      BackupSelection:
        SelectionName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-backup-selection
        IamRoleArn: !GetAtt BackupRole.Arn
        ListOfTags:
          - ConditionType: STRINGEQUALS
            ConditionKey: Backup
            ConditionValue: 'true'

  # CloudWatch Alarms for instance and volume health
  InstanceStatusAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-instance-status-check
      AlarmDescription: Alert when instance status check fails
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: StatusCheckFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref AppInstance
      Statistic: Maximum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold

  VolumeReadOpsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-volume-impaired-check
      AlarmDescription: Alert on volume impairment
      Namespace: AWS/EBS
      MetricName: VolumeQueueLength
      Dimensions:
        - Name: VolumeId
          Value: !Ref AppDataVolume
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      Threshold: 10
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref AppInstance

  DataVolumeId:
    Description: Application data EBS Volume ID
    Value: !Ref AppDataVolume

  EncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: KMS Key ARN used for EBS encryption
    Value: !GetAtt EBSEncryptionKey.Arn

  BackupVaultArn:
    Description: Backup Vault ARN
    Value: !GetAtt BackupVault.BackupVaultArn

  SecurityNote:
    Description: Security posture summary
    Value: >-
      All EBS volumes are encrypted with customer-managed KMS key,
      IMDSv2 is enforced, automated daily and weekly backups are configured,
      backup vault has deletion protection, and security group restricts
      access to internal networks only.
